data.acceptance:
- A "Refine Scope" button appears in the HeaderActions area of `beat-detail-lightbox.tsx`, following the existing button pattern (outline variant, xs size, appropriate icon).
- Clicking the button calls `enqueueBeatScopeRefinement(beat.id, repoPath)` to queue a scope-refinement job for the current beat.
- The button is disabled while the beat is in a terminal state (matches existing guard patterns on other action buttons).
- After clicking, user receives feedback that refinement was enqueued (e.g., toast or button text change to "Refining...").
- When the background worker completes refinement, the existing `useScopeRefinementNotifications` hook fires a toast and the beat detail view refreshes with updated title/description/acceptance criteria.
- No new API endpoints are introduced; the feature reuses the existing scope-refinement queue and worker infrastructure.
